heading: Election to be certified by governor
label: 1a Election to be certified by governor
text: It shall be the duty of the executive of the State from which any Senator has been chosen to certify his election, under the seal of the State, to the President of the Senate of the United States.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 18 derived from , .act July 25, 1866, ch. 245, § 314 Stat. 244
